my_thoughts: Name the fork plainly and ask for their choice. Expect a deeper question or a stall; if they stall, narrow the choice again to force ownership.
accumulated_insight: T1: Student asks ?And what is it you want from me, then???seeking_clarity via requests_clarification. They understand a demand is coming; they want the criterion. The comparison_contrast/SM_04 move sets the fork: indulge desires freely or choose the just life. Pattern: clarification request ? threshold setup. Confidence medium because explicit forks often draw a follow-up question or hesitation.
visible_response: Better ignored while doing right than praised while corrupting my soul.
